title: First Minister urged to kick US troops out of Prestwick Airport after Iran bombings

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: First Minister urged to kick US troops out of Prestwick Airport after Iran bombings. The First Minister has once again been urged to kick US troops out of Prestwick Airport, following the country's bombing of Iran.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – First Minister urged to kick US troops out of Prestwick Airport after Iran bombings
